mapper.select: SELECT m. FROM pdp_project_member m JOIN pdp_project p ON p.id=m.project_id WHERE p.workspace_id=#{workspaceId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND m.project_id=#{projectId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND m.valid_from <= #{at,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} AND (m.valid_until IS NULL OR m.valid_until > #{at,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_project_member SET valid_until=#{validUntil,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler},data_scope=#{dataScope},source=#{source},revision=#{revision} WHERE id=#{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision=#{revision}-1
